calibration.method: Bayesian MCMC (CmdStanR + brms) and quantile regression
calibration.notes: Calibration based on FIA data. 7 of 7 component models integrated (tree: DG, H-D, HG, mortality, CR; stand: SDIMAX, BAMAX).
